---
title: "The Rev. Charles Septimus Grubbe"
---

## The Rev. Charles Septimus Grubbe

**Dates:** (1830-1910)

### Description

missionary

### Biography

He was SPG missionary at Maritzburg 1858-61 and Archdeacon of Maritzburg 1861-5.  He married (1861) at Bishopstoke, Natal, Alice Mackenzie, youngest sister of CF Mackenzie [<i>Genealogical Memoranda Relating to the Grubbe Family</i> (1893)]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
